title: Tech Vertex Office Campus
testimonial: Groove Infra transformed our workspace vision into reality. Employee satisfaction scores jumped 58%, and we've attracted top talent from across India.
description: 28,000 sq ft tech campus across 4 floors featuring open collaborative zones, 12 specialized labs, executive boardrooms with integrated AV, meditation pods, and a full-scale cafeteria with modular kitchen. LEED-certified with smart HVAC and IoT-enabled facilities management.
